title: Smart Friendly Boarding System
serverHint: Point to PC running node server.js, e.g. http://192.168.0.10:3000 on same Wi‑Fi
wheelchairHint: ♿ Use step-free entrances and elevators to the platform (illustrative text, not real-time routing).
emptyPrompt: Select an origin station to see live departures and platform info from TDX.
emptyRoute: No trains on this route today. Try direction All.
emptyRouteFiltered: No matching live departures right now; scheduled trains may still appear below.
emptyOdFail: Could not load today's timetable. Check TDX connection and retry.
reassuranceTimetable: From today's timetable — delay updates closer to departure
altTransportAction: You can switch to → bus / HSR / Taiwan Tour Bus
altHintTaipei: From Taipei: try HSR (Taipei) or highway buses
altHintTainan: From Tainan: try HSR (Tainan) or highway buses
altHintTaichung: From Taichung: try HSR (Taichung) or highway buses
altHintKaohsiung: From Kaohsiung: try HSR (Zuoying) or highway buses
altHintHualien: From Hualien: try local buses or Taiwan Tour Bus
altHintDefault: Try HSR, highway buses, or Taiwan Tour Bus
reassuranceOk: Almost on time — you're all set
reassuranceModerateNoPlatform: Slight delay — watch the platform display
carNote: ＊Car layout is illustrative. Follow on-site platform signs (TDX has no car-level positioning).
footer: Data: MOTC TDX Platform ｜ Car layout is simulated, not from TDX.
statusStationsLoaded: {n} stations loaded. Select an origin station.
statusSameStation: Origin and destination cannot be the same
statusStationNotFound: Cannot find "{name}". Try the short name (e.g. Tongxiao) or tap the field to browse.
statusTdxMissing: ⚠️ TDX Client ID / Secret not configured in .env.
statusFileProtocol: ⚠️ Do not open index.html directly. Run node server.js in tdx-app, then open http://localhost:3000
statusSecretMissing: ⚠️ Client ID is set but Client Secret is missing. Edit tdx-app/.env and restart the server.
statusConnFail: Cannot connect to server. Run node server.js.
